name: Anthropic API
what_it_does: Anthropic's API providing access to Claude models for language understanding, reasoning, coding, and agentic tasks including computer use, tool use, and extended thinking.
use_cases: Complex reasoning and analysis tasks requiring high accuracy
Long document processing with 200k token context window
Agentic workflows with tool use and computer use capability
Code generation, review, and debugging from agents
Safe AI interactions requiring Constitutional AI guardrails
not_for: Cost-sensitive simple tasks (Claude can be expensive)
Real-time voice applications requiring sub-100ms latency
Very high volume with tight cost constraints
best_when: An agent needs strong reasoning, safety alignment, and long-context capabilities with reliable tool use support.
avoid_when: You need the absolute fastest inference, lowest cost per token, or open-source deployment.

auth.notes: API key in x-api-key header. Keys from Anthropic console. Organization-level key management available.

pricing.paid_tiers: Claude 3.5 Sonnet: $3/million input tokens, $15/million output. Claude 3 Haiku: $0.25/$1.25
pricing.notes: No free tier - pay-per-token. Batch API available for 50% discount on non-real-time workloads. Competitive with GPT-4 pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by tier: starts at 40 req/min, 1M tokens/min

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Excellent API error messages with type, error.type, error.message structure. Safety refusals are clearly communicated. Rate limit errors include retry guidance.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency. Each message call is independent. Sampling with temperature > 0 produces variable results.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limits scale with account age/spend - new accounts have very restrictive limits
Tool definitions count against context window - many tools reduce available space
Streaming responses require different SDK handling than non-streaming
Computer use feature (beta) has additional setup and safety considerations
Output token limits per request - agents generating long outputs need careful management
Safety filters can occasionally refuse valid requests - retry with rephrasing sometimes needed
